title: antennaria alpina var. monocephala
intro: Antennaria alpina var. monocephala, also known as mountain everlasting or white-top mountain everlastings, is a unique flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, derived from its leaf and flower extracts. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Antennaria alpina var. monocephala can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or applied topically in the form of salves or ointments.
